message:
fix(test): stabilize flaky test_merge_key_stream_kind_ordering

The test was intermittently failing when run with the full test suite
because epoch_ms_now() could return different millisecond values for
the egress and lifecycle captures, causing timestamp-based sorting
to override the intended stream_kind ordering test.

Fix: normalize recorded_at_ms to 0 before sorting so the test
isolates stream_kind ordering from timing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
